data.title: Despite Unrealized Losses, Semler Scientific Plans $500 Million Securities Offering To Boost Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: Healthcare technology company Semler Scientific Inc. (NASDAQ:SMLR) announced its latest securities offering Tuesday to add to its fast-expanding Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) stockpile.

data.title: Tesla Bull Ross Gerber Says Elon Musk 'Doesn't Care' About Company Anymore, Blames Focus On Other Ventures For EV Maker's Slump
data.description: Ross Gerber criticized Elon Musk on Tuesday, stating that Musk "just doesn't care" about the electric vehicle maker.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg Defends Meta In FTC Trial Over $6 Billion Offer To Acquire Snapchat: 'We Would Have Accelerated Their Growth'
data.description: Mark Zuckerberg's resurfaced $6 billion offer to buy Snapchat took center stage in Meta's antitrust trial.

data.title: Google's VEO 2 Will Allow You To Create High-Resolution Videos With Text In Gemini App, Sundar Pichai Shows Off Cyberpunk Style Anime
data.description: Google has rolled out its Veo 2 AI text-to-video generator to Gemini Advanced users, taking on OpenAI's Sora and Runway.

data.title: Nvidia Supplier ASML Beats Revenue, EPS Estimates: EUV Product Mix, Performance Milestones Drive Q1, Says CEO
data.description: ASML Holding reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings as its revenue and earnings per share beat analyst estimates on Wednesday.
